source.requestBody: {"query": "let start = startofday(ago(1d)); let end = startofday(now()); let actuals = AppTraces | where TimeGenerated >= start and TimeGenerated < end | where Message has '[MESSAGE-CORE][SEND]' | where Message has 'Fiscal code check passed' or Message has 'Fiscal code check failed' | extend status = case(Message has 'Fiscal code check passed', 'sent', Message has 'Fiscal code check failed', 'discarded', 'unknown') | extend associated_payment = tobool(extract(@'associatedPayment: (\\w+)', 1, Message)) | summarize message_total_count = count(), message_sent_count = countif(status == 'sent'), message_discarded_count = countif(status == 'discarded'), sent_with_payment = countif(status == 'sent' and associated_payment == true), sent_without_payment = countif(status == 'sent' and associated_payment == false) by window_start = bin(TimeGenerated, 15m); range window_start from start to (end - 15m) step 15m | join kind=leftouter actuals on window_start | project window_start = tostring(window_start), message_total_count = coalesce(message_total_count, 0), message_sent_count = coalesce(message_sent_count, 0), message_discarded_count = coalesce(message_discarded_count, 0), sent_with_payment = coalesce(sent_with_payment, 0), sent_without_payment = coalesce(sent_without_payment, 0) | order by window_start asc"}
